name: feature-session-selector
description: Create FeatureSessionSelector component - sidebar list of FeatureSessions with selection state and status badges.
acceptanceCriteria: Accepts sessions array, selectedId, and onSelect callback props
Renders scrollable list of session cards showing name, status badge, and creation date
Status badge uses color coding: discovery=purple, analysis=blue, design=orange, spec=green, implementation=teal
Includes search/filter input for session name
Empty state message when no sessions exist
Uses shadcn Card and Badge components
